conversation.message_text: Skull Shaver: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Skull Shaver: Welcome to Skull Shaver! You've taken the first step to upgrading your shaving game! We'll be sure to keep you updated on upcoming promotions, product launches and exciting developments in the world of Skull Shaver.

Get started now and save 10% off $100+. Your welcome code is: HELLOhuPGGG

Automatically apply it & shop now: https://skullshaver.attn.tv/aAv1SYDfnmYB
Skull Shaver: Also, don't forget to save our contact!

Skull Shaver: Hey there, Sarah here! 

I noticed you eyeing our Pitbull Platinum PRO PX5 Head and Face Shaver | 2025 Version (with Deluxe Travel Case & Rinse Stand)...it's selling fast! Tap to get it before it's gone: https://skullshaver.attn.tv/a1_FyXUu4mds

Otherwise, are there any questions I can answer for you?
Yes I wanted to purchase that but it kept including the cost to keep sending replacement blades and I don't want that can you help me.
Skull Shaver: Sure thing! You can just select 'Shaver Only' instead of the shaver and the Club Savings Plan. Let me know if you do not come right.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

GLD: We process orders in 1-2 business days and usually ship via USPS, UPS or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 5-10 business days domestically. 

You'll get a tracking email as soon as your order ships. If you don't see it in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders, sometimes our emails end up there as well.

Template used: "My item has been with UPS / USPS/ FedEx for a while now, it's not moving - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:48:27.752

FaithGateway: I'm sorry to hear that. Are you referring to Order #2273895? If so, UPS has your package and will deliver it today, February 13, by 9:00 P.M. You can track it here: https://fg.attn.tv/abj4rHiBpVql

Since the package is already with the carrier, it's best to contact them directly. Have you tried giving them a call? They should have the most up-to-date information. You can contact UPS support at 1-888-742-5877.
